Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Text Ruling

(Joinder) Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Steve Casey's Joinder Motion for Protective Order is granted in part. See Ruling on the underlying motion. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant MTM TECHNOLOGIES, INC's Motion For Protective Order is granted in part. While a protective order may be appropriate for certain documents, the court is not persuaded that all the categories of documents designated by Defendant are confidential. The proposed Protective Order does not define the documents which should be subject to such an designation. Part of the argument made in support of the entry of such an order goes to matters of privacy, and there are more appropriate ways to protect privacy. Also, the order must put the burden of defending the confidential designation on the producing party. All parties are ordered to meet and confer regarding an appropriate Protective Order and to submit a proposed order within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents To Deft Mtm Pursuant To Ccp 2031.310; Oppos
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff AMANDA MHANNA's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is granted as Defendants are ordered to produce all responsive documents within five days of the entry of a court-approved confidentiality order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
